---
title: "Supplement C: Scoping Review Results - Selected Metrics"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
tar_load(count_metric)
tar_load(taxized)
tar_load(geocoded)
tar_load(review)
```


- highlighting unavailability of selected metrics despite high use in literature
- detailed justification of not selected metrics
